name: MacOS Input Fixes (Helper)
description: This mod fixes MC-22882, MC-59810, MC-121772, and MC-122296. It makes scrolling with shift work properly on macOS, left click + control = left click (instead of right click) and more fixes! See the full list of fixes on the site. Note: this is the helper mod, which just loads the appropriate version (<26.1 or >= 26.1), Mod Menu will show the actual implementation mod at runtime.
